layout.layout_rhythm: cobalt-grid: medium density, high formality. Electric cobalt serifs on a graph-paper canvas, anchored by stair-stepped pixel-glitch decorations and slim hairline rules.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"edge": "clamp(36px, 3.6vw, 80px)", "edge_inner": "clamp(60px, 8vw, 160px)", "pad_top": "clamp(76px, 8vh, 130px)", "pad_bottom": "clamp(100px, 10vh, 150px)", "gap_lg": "clamp(28px, 3vw, 56px)", "gap_md": "clamp(20px, 2.

template_json_typography.style: transitional serif for hero type and section heads, paired with a neutral grotesk for body and a clean mono for tabular data and micro-captions; strictly cobalt-on-cream

design_tokens_typography.style: transitional serif for hero type and section heads, paired with a neutral grotesk for body and a clean mono for tabular data and micro-captions; strictly cobalt-on-cream

typography.typography_role: transitional serif for hero type and section heads, paired with a neutral grotesk for body and a clean mono for tabular data and micro-captions; strictly cobalt-on-cream

cjk_policy.known_degradation: Noto Serif SC has no italic axis (Chinese type historically has no italic), so the manifesto layout's italic-Newsreader-with-`.roman`-flip emphasis pattern collapses when content is Hanzi. Substitute a weight contrast (NSC 700 vs NSC 400) or a faint-cobalt tone (`{colors.ink-faint}`) to recover the emphasis register. Newsreader's optical-size axis (6..72) ha

template_json_palette.description: warm cream / ivory paper canvas with one strict accent of electric cobalt royal blue. The grid is a faint cobalt overlay, and decorations (pixel stair-blocks, QR-style mini-grids, hairline rules) all use the same blue, keeping the deck strictly bichromatic

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Newsreader 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Serif Pro 与 思源宋体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Hanken Grotesk 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 DM Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 DM Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

text_transform: uppercase` on any micro/label/kicker when content is Hanzi — Chinese has no case
writing_mode: vertical-rl` and `text-orientation: mixed`, rotating Latin text 90° clockwise. Anchored to right edge, vertically centered, evenly spaced. Reads as catalogue-style metadata stacked along the slide edge. **Topbar (with rule)** — A flex row containing a Newsreader headline left and a small mono lab-tag right, separated from the content below by a 1.5px solid cobalt bottom border. The universal section-header pattern. **Frame** — An absolutely-positioned content container with `inset: {spacing.pad-top
vertical-rl` work for Hanzi too — Chinese is the original vertical script — but mixing Latin and Hanzi in the same vertical run will rotate the Hanzi to upright while keeping Latin rotated 90°

alignment.fallback: left/top aligned unless source screenshot is centered

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: e `<em>` and for the manifesto's editorial italic-with-`.roman`-flip treatment. Underline is not used. Line-height collapses at the top: display-hero / vbig-numeral at 0.92, display-chapter at 1.0, body at 1.5. The tight display + open body contrast is what gives the system its trend-report rhythm.

italic.raw_value: em runs on a **three-face conversation**: `Newsreader` (serif, weight 400 / 500 italic) carries every display and headline; `Hanken Grotesk` (sans, weights 400–700) carries every body, label, and micro-text; `DM Mono` (monospace, 400–500) carries every chrome element. There is no fourth face. Newsr
